expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards in the right column are cut off by the edge of the screen. Multiple rows show only part of the third card, which makes the layout look horizontally overflowing or improperly sized.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of cards.
The top category navigation is clipped on the right side, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
The active 'Home' tab has a strong blue gradient/shadow that creates a slightly uneven visual edge at the bottom of the pill.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue specifically describes a broken Casino icon design or layout problem in the bottom navigation bar; reported issues focus on card cutoff, nav overlap, top nav clipping, and tab styling.
